seoTitle: Apply Texture to Text in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to add texture effects to text in Canva to make your headlines and titles stand out in marketing and social designs.
intro: Textured text can add depth and visual interest to headlines, social posts, and branding materials. This guide covers how to apply texture effects to text inside Canva.

steps.heading: Access the texture feature
steps.body: Open your text element in Canva and locate the effects or styling options where texture settings are available.

steps.heading: Select the right texture
steps.body: Browse the available texture options and choose one that complements your design's overall tone and color scheme.

steps.heading: Apply and adjust settings
steps.body: Apply the texture to your text and fine-tune settings like intensity or blending to get the look you want.

steps.heading: Avoid common mistakes
steps.body: Be careful not to overuse heavy textures on small text, as it can reduce readability.

faq.question: Will textured text still be readable?
faq.answer: It depends on the texture's intensity and the text size; lighter textures on larger headlines tend to stay more legible.

faq.question: Is the texture feature available for free users?
faq.answer: Some texture options are available on the free plan, while more advanced styles may require a Canva Pro subscription.

faq.question: Can I apply texture to any font?
faq.answer: Most fonts support texture effects, though bold or larger fonts tend to display textures more clearly.

faq.question: Does this feature work well for social media graphics?
faq.answer: Yes, textured text is a popular choice for eye-catching social media posts and promotional graphics.
